basics.name: Devika Sunitha
basics.label: Experienced Technical Writer & Team Manager
basics.summary: Experienced Technical Writer with 15 years in the IT industry and a strong managerial background, seeking a challenging role to apply expertise in documentation and knowledge management. Proven track record in leading Learning and Development projects, crafting tailored content for diverse verticals. Proficient in creating user manuals, instruction manuals, and API documents, with a knack for coordinating website development and spearheading content projects.

work.name: Jocata
work.summary: Led the Technical Writing and Content Development function with focus on documentation governance, AI transformation, and enterprise knowledge management.
highlights: Established and scaled the Technical Writing and Content Development function from the ground up, defining team vision and operating model
Designed and implemented the organization's end-to-end documentation governance process with standardized workflows and quality assurance practices
Developed enterprise-wide branded documentation templates and style guides, improving consistency across all documentation
Spearheaded AI transformation strategy integrating generative AI into documentation workflows, enabling large-scale document modernization and automation

work.name: ADF
work.summary: Initiated comprehensive documentation for the Chennai branch and championed standardized documentation practices.
highlights: Initiated comprehensive documentation for the Chennai branch, customizing content for support teams
Fostered cross-functional collaboration for precise technical content, implementing versatile document templates
Championed standardized documentation practices focusing on clarity and effectiveness
Provided strategic insights into product release processes through participation in management meetings

work.name: Flytxt
work.summary: Authored technical documentation and collaborated with cross-functional teams to produce user manuals and architectural diagrams.
highlights: Authored and updated technical documentation for products, enhancing accessibility of critical information
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to gather information and produce user manuals, installation guides, and architectural diagrams
Conducted meticulous reviews ensuring accuracy, clarity, and consistency in technical content
Created documentation for diverse user needs across multiple product lines

work.name: QBurst
work.summary: Participated in requirement gathering and project documentation, translating business needs into technical specifications.
highlights: Actively participated in requirement gathering, ensuring comprehensive understanding of project specifications
Established collaboration with clients, translating business needs into actionable technical requirements
Contributed to project documentation including detailed functional specifications and user stories

work.name: TCS
work.summary: Monitored World Bank project operations and collaborated with global teams on project delivery.
highlights: Monitored World Bank project, swiftly identifying and addressing alerts to ensure seamless operation
Collaborated with a diverse global team, ensuring successful project delivery through effective teamwork
Achieved promotion to Assistant Project Lead within one year, demonstrating rapid learning and effective leadership
